industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: OPC Energy Ltd.
summary: OPC Energy Ltd. owns, develops, and operates power generation facilities in Israeli. It operates a conventional combined cycle power plant with an installed capacity of 466 megawatts (MW); steam boilers and turbines with an installed capacity of up to 18 MW; and a natural gas-fired open-cycle power station with a capacity of approximately 396 MW, as well as has a co-generation power plant with an installed capacity of 148 MW, which is under construction. The company was formerly known as IC Power Israel Ltd. and changed its name to OPC Energy Ltd. in July 2017. The company was incorporated in 2010 and is based in Tel Aviv, Israel. OPC Energy Ltd. is a subsidiary of Kenon Holdings Ltd.
